message:
fix: agent bead read-modify-write race, audit log path, and redirect safety (gt-fcqj7)

- Add UpdateAgentDescriptionFields for batched agent field updates in a
  single Show-Parse-Modify-Update cycle, preventing concurrent callers from
  overwriting each others changes to different fields
- Fix audit log writing to resolved beads dir instead of workDir, so
  entries go to correct location when beads are redirected
- Use sync.Once for thread-safe lazy caching in getTownRoot()
- Fix SetupRedirect safety check to also block when parts[0]==mayor
  (worktree IS the mayor directory, not just inside one)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
